prompt: Create a minimalist rainbow neon line art illustration depicting a Little Red Book app interface female profile page. Use clean, continuous colored sketch strokes on a pure white background, inspired by modern silhouette art. A curvy female character should stand confidently outside the profile box in a walking pose, highlighting a graceful figure. The profile UI should include a circular avatar, username, verification badge, follower count, bio text, tabs, and post previews. Add only fine colored outlines with no solid fills, maintaining a high-end futuristic aesthetic. Ultra-clean composition, minimal shading, artistic neon pencil sketch style, modern social media poster design.
